title: Sakaler Sure
desc: Bengali artists love devotional and folk songs. These songs inspire singers and audiences alike. They celebrate culture and faith, creating a shared experience.

title: Kamalar Banabas
desc: Princess Kamala's marriage faces a crisis when she's accused of an affair during pregnancy, challenging trust, family loyalties, and royal duties.

title: Bengal Dance T20 Premier League S02
desc: A dance reality competition showcases talented performers competing in energetic routines, judged on creativity, skill, and expression in a vibrant and entertaining format.

title: Mejo Bou
desc: The film revolves around a mother-in-law, who treats her daughters-in-laws, Mamta, Tandra and Deepa, according to their husband's income. However, when she falls ill, she realises her folly.

title: Shatru Mitra
desc: Police officer Shubhankar Sanyal bravely takes on notorious leader Nishikanta Saha and his gang, determined to restore peace and safety in Haridevpur..

title: Anyay Atyachar
desc: In a drunken mix-up, Udayan spends the night with his friend's daughter, believing she's his wife. Chaos unfolds as he unknowingly leaves the next morning.

title: Loafer
desc: Bikram known as Lofar, helped his friend Vashkar to get married to his lover and got arrested. But bailed by his brother Rajib. Vikram was a very helpful person but was hated his entire family.

title: Marjina Abdulla
desc: Ali, A Poor Man, Finds Treasure In The Woods And Takes It For Himself. However, When He Finds Himself Being Chased By Thieves, He Seeks Help From His Brother'S Servants, Marjina And Abdullah.

title: Bandie
desc: Maharaj Brajbhan and wife, unable to conceive, face throne usurpation by cousin Vikram. Chaos erupts as Vikram plots to kill the pregnant queen.

title: Bhai Amar Bhai
desc: When a fire breaks out, three children lose their father and get separated. When they reunite, they vow to take revenge against their father's killer.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!
